# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateAdminReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $status   = isset($_POST['status']) ? trim((string)$_POST['status']) : '';
    $category = isset($_POST['category']) ? trim((string)$_POST['category']) : '';
    $fromDate = isset($_POST['from_date']) ? trim((string)$_POST['from_date']) : '';
    $toDate   = isset($_POST['to_date']) ? trim((string)$_POST['to_date']) : '';

    $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
    $params = [];

    if ($status !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $status;
    }

    if ($category !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $category;
    }

    if ($fromDate !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND created_at >= :from_date";
        $params[':from_date'] = $fromDate . " 00:00:00";
    }

    if ($toDate !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND created_at <= :to_date";
        $params[':to_date'] = $toDate . " 23:59:59";
    }

    $sql .= " ORDER BY created_at DESC";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);

    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function generateAdminReportSummary(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $status   = isset($_POST['status']) ? trim((string)$_POST['status']) : '';
    $category = isset($_POST['category']) ? trim((string)$_POST['category']) : '';
    $fromDate = isset($_POST['from_date']) ? trim((string)$_POST['from_date']) : '';
    $toDate   = isset($_POST['to_date']) ? trim((string)$_POST['to_date']) : '';

    $sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
    $params = [];

    if ($status !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $status;
    }

    if ($category !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $category;
    }

    if ($fromDate !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND created_at >= :from_date";
        $params[':from_date'] = $fromDate . " 00:00:00";
    }

    if ($toDate !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND created_at <= :to_date";
        $params[':to_date'] = $toDate . " 23:59:59";
    }

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);

    return $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: ['total' => 0, 'total_amount' => 0];
}

?>
